name: index-server
description: Index Server providing governed, classified, and auditable instruction indexes with analytics and optional admin dashboard.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Index Server
walkthroughs.description: Set up your governed instruction index for AI agents.

steps.title: Configure the Server
steps.description:
Set the server path and generate MCP client configuration.

[Configure MCP Client](command:index.configure)

media.markdown:
## Configure

Run **Index: Configure MCP Client** to auto-generate your `mcp.json` configuration.

The extension uses `npx @jagilber-org/index-server` by default — zero config needed.
Optionally set `index.serverPath` to use a local checkout.

steps.title: Search Instructions
steps.description:
Use the index search tools in Copilot Chat agent mode.

Try asking: *Search the instruction index for deployment guidelines*

media.markdown:
## Search

The MCP server provides **keyword**, **regex**, and **semantic** search across your instruction index.

```
Search the index for security best practices
```

steps.title: Open the Dashboard
steps.description:
Enable the admin dashboard for real-time monitoring.

[Open Dashboard](command:index.openDashboard)

media.markdown:
## Dashboard

1. Enable: `index.dashboard.enabled` -> `true`
2. Run **Index: Open Dashboard**
3. Browse analytics, health, and session tracking at `http://localhost:8787`

steps.title: Check Status
steps.description:
Verify your server configuration and connection.

[Show Status](command:index.showStatus)

media.markdown:
## Status

Run **Index: Show Status** to see:
- Server path and availability
- Instructions directory
- Dashboard and mutation settings
- Extension path

index.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the Index Server dist/server/index-server.js. Leave empty to use npx @jagilber-org/index-server.

index.instructionsDir.description: Absolute path to the instructions directory. Leave empty for built-in defaults.

index.dashboard.enabled.description: Enable the admin dashboard HTTP server.

index.dashboard.port.description: Port for the admin dashboard HTTP server.

index.logLevel.description: Log level for the MCP server.

index.mutation.enabled.description: Enable mutation operations (add, import, remove, etc.).
